title: thymus linearis var. linearis
intro: Thymus linearis var. linearis, commonly known as Wild Thyme, is a low-growing, woody perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Wild Thyme include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, Wild Thyme is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in aromatherapy and skincare products, due to its fragrant and therapeutic properties.
